name: python3-opengl
title: python3-opengl
description:
Python bindings to OpenGL (Python 3)
PyOpenGL is a cross-platform open source Python binding to the standard
OpenGL API providing 2D and 3D graphic drawing. PyOpenGL supports the
GL, GLU, GLE, and GLUT libraries. The library can be used with the Tkinter,
wxPython, FxPy, and Win32GUI windowing libraries (or almost any Python
windowing library which can provide an OpenGL context).
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-opengl because Python bindings to OpenGL (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-opengl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-opengl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-opengl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
